description: Quan ly danh muc doi tuong GIS (diem, duong, vung), quan ly KCHT tren ban do

features.name: Quan ly danh muc doi tuong diem
features.scope: Chuyen vien - Them/sua/xoa doi tuong diem GIS (cang bien, den bien, phao tieu, dai)
business_rules: Doi tuong diem: cang bien, den bien, phao tieu, dai
acceptance_criteria: Quan ly doi tuong diem thanh cong

features.name: Quan ly danh muc doi tuong duong
features.scope: Chuyen vien - Them/sua/xoa doi tuong duong GIS (luong, de/ke)
business_rules: Doi tuong duong: luong hang hai, de/ke
acceptance_criteria: Quan ly doi tuong duong thanh cong

features.name: Quan ly danh muc doi tuong vung
features.scope: Chuyen vien - Them/sua/xoa doi tuong vung GIS (vung nuoc, khu neo dau)
business_rules: Doi tuong vung: vung nuoc, khu neo dau
acceptance_criteria: Quan ly doi tuong vung thanh cong

features.name: Quan ly thong tin KCHT tren ban do
features.scope: Chuyen vien - Quan ly KCHT tren ban do GIS
business_rules: Xem danh sach/chi tiet tren ban do
acceptance_criteria: Quan ly KCHT tren ban do thanh cong

features.name: Tra cuu KCHT tren ban do
features.scope: Tat ca roles - Tra cuu KCHT tren ban do GIS
acceptance_criteria: Tra cuu KCHT tren ban do thanh cong
